title: Share public link to board that can be filtered
excerpt: I need to share a public link to a board view where it is possible for person using the link to filter.  Is this possible?  I need to show executives without log in where their project requests stand in the workflow / ap…

posts.author: sherrycrist (Sherry Crist)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to share a public link to a board view where it is possible for person using the link to filter. Is this possible? I need to show executives without log in where their project requests stand in the workflow / approval process.

Thanks in advance for any ideas or assistance.

posts.author: rhj09 (Rh Jaffery)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Currently, public links to Monday board views don’t support filtering by the viewer. Here are some alternatives:

  1. Dashboard Widgets: Share a dashboard with pre-filtered widgets.
  2. Filtered Views: Create and share multiple views with the needed filters.
  3. Custom Reports: Share reports that show filtered data.

For more options, check with Monday’s support.

Hope this helps!

Best,

RHJ
McDonaldsMenu.Ph

posts.author: lberhe (Lette)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sherrycrist, have you found another solution/workaround for this?

I’m still looking

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sherrycrist ,

I came across your post and thought the scheduled board snapshots feature in Smart Spreadsheet might be a good fit for your case. I can’t say for certain, but you can take a look at this community post to see if it meets your needs
